title: arctotis aspera f. scabra
intro: Arctotis aspera f. scabra, also known as the rough arctotis or rough silver daisy, is a flowering plant species native to southern Africa, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and rough, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arctotis aspera f. scabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
